$comment: Static config per case study. Live metrics come from /api/case-study-data. amazonAsin, goodreadsId, spotifyShowId are filled when credentials/IDs land (NEXT-STEPS.md); empty string means that source is stubbed.

ai-or-die.title: AI or Die
ai-or-die.blurb: We ran the six-month arc on ourselves. Book launched 2026-06-24. Live metrics refresh hourly. This is the case study we can prove because we still own it.
